dailyNews.title: Potential Democratic 2028 Candidates Condemn Trump’s ‘War of Choice’ in Iran
dailyNews.description: At a convention in New York, several Democrats mulling presidential bids rallied around opposition to President Trump’s decision to attack Iran.

dailyNews.title: Burned Before, Democrats Abruptly Revive the Idea of Impeaching Trump
dailyNews.description: Democrats in Congress have assiduously avoided talk of a third impeachment of President Trump, concerned that it would distract from their midterm campaign message. That tide seems to have turned.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

dailyNews.title: Planned "Arc de Trump" would be over twice as high as Lincoln Memorial
dailyNews.description: Plans submitted by the Interior Department show the triumphal arch would be 250 feet tall, the tallest triumphal arch in the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump proposes painting executive office building white
dailyNews.description: The building sits across a driveway from the West Wing and was completed in 1888.

dailyNews.title: Vance says he is positive about Iran talks but Trump is still slamming Tehran
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance appears positive about talks with Iran in Pakistan, but President Trump remains frustrated about Tehran's control over the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe and Imtiaz Tyab report.

dailyNews.title: Farmers react to high gas prices as Trump's Iran war rages on
dailyNews.description: Farmers across America are grappling with soaring fuel prices as the war in Iran impacts energy costs. CBS News' Lana Zak reports.

dailyNews.title: A mother mourning the son she lost in the Iran war says she told Trump: 'Go get 'em'
dailyNews.description: More than a month after her son, Maj. Cody Khork, died in the Iran war, Donna Burhans has found a routine that helps her cope.
